body:
## ✅ Fixed - 3D Borough Map Rendering

### Problem Identified
The 3D borough map was showing no boroughs because the GeoJSON data contains **MultiPolygon geometries** with multiple separate landmasses per borough, but the code only processed the first polygon.

### Root Cause
1. **Type mismatch**: BoroughData.coordinates was typed as number[][][] (single polygon) but GeoJSON contained number[][][][] (multiple polygons)
2. **Data loss**: parseBoroughGeoJSON only extracted coordinates[0], discarding all other polygons
3. **Rendering failure**: Borough component couldn't render because it was missing 99% of the geometry data

### Data Structure (verified via test script)
- **Manhattan**: 31 polygons, 6,320 total points
- **Brooklyn**: 18 polygons, 17,604 total points
- **Queens**: 17 polygons, 27,058 total points
- **Bronx**: 24 polygons, 8,671 total points
- **Staten Island**: 4 polygons, 9,024 total points

### Changes Made

#### 1. src/lib/boroughData.ts
- Updated BoroughData interface: coordinates: number[][][][] (array of polygons)
- Fixed parseBoroughGeoJSON to preserve ALL polygons from MultiPolygon
- Added comprehensive logging for debugging
- Handle both MultiPolygon and Polygon geometry types

#### 2. src/components/BoroughMap3D.tsx
- Updated BoroughProps to accept coordinates: number[][][][]
- Fixed geometry creation to iterate over all polygons in each borough
- Properly process outer ring and holes for each polygon
- Added validation and fallback geometry
- Added extensive console logging for debugging

#### 3. src/components/BoroughMap3DPremium.tsx
- Same coordinate type fixes
- Updated geometry creation logic to handle MultiPolygon
- Maintained all premium shader effects and animations

### Testing Results
✅ TypeScript build succeeds
✅ All 5 boroughs render with correct geometries
✅ Coordinate transformation working: [-74.0, 40.7] centering
✅ Total 68,677 points processed across all boroughs
✅ Tested hover, select, rotation, zoom interactions

### Files Changed
- src/lib/boroughData.ts (type definitions + parsing logic)
- src/components/BoroughMap3D.tsx (standard 3D map)
- src/components/BoroughMap3DPremium.tsx (premium 3D map)

### Pull Request
**PR #11**: https://github.com/jgarcia260/nyc-tax-viz/pull/11

### How to Verify
1. npm run dev
2. Navigate to http://localhost:3000/borough-map-3d
3. All 5 boroughs should render as 3D extruded geometries:
   - Manhattan (red)
   - Brooklyn (teal)
   - Queens (yellow)
   - Bronx (mint green)
   - Staten Island (lavender)
4. Test interactions (hover, click, rotate, zoom)
5. Check browser console for detailed logs

### Notes
- Added extensive logging (can be cleaned up later if desired)
- Backward compatible with single Polygon geometries
- Handles polygon holes (inner rings) properly
- Maintained all visual styles and effects
